mapper.select: SELECT portfolio_id , user_id , portfolio_nm , portfolio_desc , base_currency , use_yn , reg_dt , upd_dt FROM tbl_portfolio WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT portfolio_id , user_id , portfolio_nm , portfolio_desc , base_currency , use_yn , reg_dt , upd_dt FROM tbl_portfolio WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY reg_dt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_portfolio ( user_id , portfolio_nm , portfolio_desc , base_currency , use_yn , reg_dt , upd_dt ) VALUES ( #{userId} , #{portfolioNm} , #{portfolioDesc} , COALESCE(#{baseCurrency}, 'USD') , 'Y' , NOW() , NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_portfolio SET use_yn = 'N' , upd_dt = NOW() WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
